title: SwordsMod
description: This mod adds in basic swords that are stronger then diamond!
body:
Check out my Youtube Channel! https://www.youtube.com/kingrealzyt

 

(Outdated for now) Link to the showcase and all the items: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T5iehbgsjds&ab_channel=KingRealzYT 

My discord: https://discord.gg/4EGwjRK

 

With this mod, you can create swords to help fight off mobs and find new blocks and ingots in the process!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Credits To: Realz (Me), Azzy, G1, goldrat, Higherlevel, Adex, Brammie, Super Teamet Mand 1, Affehund

 -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ender ore

Infested Sword
Hell Bender Sword

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Holy Sword
